scope_note: Drawn from the dossier-anchored confidence subgraph (2-hop around 363 dossier seeds, ~7-8k nodes). This is more analytically rigorous than corpus-wide because it has the full uncertainty-propagation stack computed (mean_edge_credibility, contradiction_density, cluster_confidence). A v2 covering the full 3.3M-edge corpus would require running confidence-graph scoring at corpus scale, which is parked.
